PROP-01b-partial1-pre-005.text: isValidSignature must reject orders with sellAmount exceeding contract balance.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-005.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.sellAmount <= balanceOf(this); else revert InsufficientBalance

locations.note: sellAmount > assetInBalance check at lines 144-146; reverts InsufficientAssetInBalance
